prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: consumable scroll icon set for Orbwalker inventory UI
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source icon sheet with eight consumable scroll icons.
Subject: 4x2 sheet with fire scroll, ice scroll, earth scroll, healing scroll, armor ward scroll, gold charm scroll, reroll scroll, emergency escape scroll; each icon distinct and centered.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game inventory icons with crisp silhouettes.
Composition/framing: evenly spaced icons, consistent size, no clipping.
Color palette: parchment, wax seals, elemental accents, gold and silver details, but no magenta inside icon art.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no panel; no frame; no matte backdrop; no labels; no readable text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any icon.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
